title: Nolando StructureZ
description: Adds structures that revolve around the Zombie Apocalypse theme
body:
A brand new mod presenting new structures made to fit into the zombie apocalypse theme. Currently it adds 4 new structures that have been premade by BuildBucket, visit their download 
link here: (https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/post-apo-pack-free-download-1-20/)

![Permission to Use Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/009235e6ef50740d0e8f5ef71cc24fa7466de14f.png)


Structures Added:
1. Abandoned Bank
2. Abandoned Hotel
3. Abandoned Suburban
4. Overgrown Suburban
 

There is also an optional mod that you can install that injects TacZ (Timeless and Classics: Zero) into this mod's loot tables. (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nolando-loot)


Also try the newer version of this mod, Nolando Apocalypse!
